items.title: Lowe’s (LOW) Holds Steady While Home Depot Stumbles, Stifel Says
items.description: Lowe’s Companies, Inc. (NYSE:LOW) is included among the 15 Blue Chip Dividend Stocks to Build a Passive Income Porfolio. On December 1, Stifel raised its price target on Lowe’s Companies, Inc. (NYSE:LOW) from $230 to $250, while maintaining a Hold rating on the stock. items.title: Can Home Depot (HD) Stock Rebound in 2026?
items.description: The company is struggling, and the stock is reflecting it.

items.title: Jim Cramer Believes “Home Depot’s the Most Sensitive to a Decline in Interest Rates”

items.title: Jim Cramer Mentions Tapestry Among the “List of Retailers That Performed Sharply Better Than Expected”
